title: tarenna ebracteata
intro: Tarenna ebracteata, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is a type of shrub or small tree native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Tarenna ebracteata include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
